content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 12 (C:12):

Atom C:12 is connected to:
- C:11 (carbon with index 11) - to the left
- C:13 (carbon with index 13) - to the right  
- Cl:44 (chlorine with index 44) - above it (green atom)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 5880, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_5880.xyz".

So the neighbor atoms of C:12 are:
- Atom index 11, element C
- Atom index 13, element C  
- Atom index 44, element Cl

Geomconf_index: 5880

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 12, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
